name: caldera
title: caldera
description:
Scalable Automated Adversary Emulation Platform
This package contains a cyber security framework designed to easily automate
adversary emulation, assist manual red-teams, and automate incident response.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use caldera because Scalable Automated Adversary Emulation Platform.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use caldera as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `caldera [options] [args]` as documented upstream for caldera.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair caldera with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `caldera --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
